archiveConfirm: Archiving moves this course to "Archived". You can restore it later; editing and learning remain available while archived.
askPreviewQuestionPlaceholder: Enter a question a learner might ask
askPreviewUsedFallback: {provider} failed, switched to the built-in LLM

askProviderDescriptions.coze: Use a Coze bot to answer learner follow-up questions.
askProviderDescriptions.coze_workflow: Use a Coze workflow to answer learner follow-up questions.
askProviderDescriptions.dify: Use a Dify chat app to answer learner follow-up questions.
askProviderDescriptions.get_biji_knowledge: Retrieve from a Get Biji knowledge base, then let the built-in LLM answer learner follow-up questions.
askProviderDescriptions.llm: Use the built-in LLM to answer learner follow-up questions.
askProviderDescriptions.volc_knowledge: Search a Volcengine knowledge base before answering learner follow-up questions.

account_id.hint: Volcengine account ID for the V-Account-Id header.
account_id.label: Account ID

askProviderModes.provider_then_llm: Use provider first, then LLM if it fails

askProviderSelect: Choose how follow-up answers are generated
askTemperatureHint: Control how varied follow-up answers can be (0-2, 0 is recommended)
debugDisabledBySoftLimit: Credit balance is below the reminder threshold. Debug preview is disabled.
draftConflictDescription: This course was updated by {phone}. Load the latest content to continue editing safely.
draftConflictSynced: This lesson was updated by {phone}. Synced the latest content.
draftSelfUpdateDescription: This lesson was updated in another page or tool. Load the latest content to keep editing safely.
draftSelfUpdateSynced: This lesson was updated in another page or tool. Synced the latest content.
imageFormatHint: Used on the course card and learner page. JPG or PNG, up to 2MB, 1:1 recommended
inputKeywords: Enter a keyword and press Enter
minimaxCloneDisplayNameHint: Optional. If left blank, a name is generated so you can identify the voice later.
minimaxClonePreviewUnavailable: Preview is available after the voice is ready
minimaxCloneRecordingUnsupported: Recording is not available in this browser
minimaxCloneSourceAudioDescription: Record one person speaking clearly for at least {minSeconds}s and up to {maxMinutes} minutes. Use a quiet room and avoid background music.
minimaxCloneSubmitReasonCloneInProgress: Voice cloning has been submitted and is waiting for processing.
minimaxCloneSubmitReasonInsufficientCred: Insufficient credits to submit voice cloning.
minimaxCloneSubmitReasonMissingSource: Record at least {seconds}s of voice sample.
minimaxCloneSubmitReasonRecording: Recording is in progress. Stop recording before submitting.
minimaxCloneSubmitReasonSourceTooShort: The voice sample must be at least {minSeconds}s. Current length is {currentSeconds}s. Continue recording past {minSeconds}s before stopping.
minimaxManualVoiceInvalid: Enter a valid MiniMax custom voice ID
permissionContactRequired: Please enter at least one contact
permissionEmailPlaceholder: Enter email addresses, separated by comma or newline
permissionLimit: Up to {count} shared users are allowed
permissionOwnerNotAllowed: You can't grant permissions to the course creator
permissionPhonePlaceholder: Enter phone numbers to grant shared access in bulk
permissionSectionDesc: Grant access to this course for other users
selectModelHint: Controls main course content generation; use the default model if unsure
shifuDescriptionPlaceholder: Briefly explain who this course is for and what learners will get
shifuNamePlaceholder: Enter a course name learners can understand
shifuPriceFormat: Price must be a valid number
shifuPromptHint: Tell the AI who this course is for, what tone to use, and which rules it must follow
shifuPromptPlaceholder: Example: For beginners, use a friendly tone, show an example before explaining each concept
shifuTemperatureFormat: Temperature must be a valid number
supportedFormats: Only JPG and PNG formats are supported
temperatureHint: Control how varied generated course content can be (0-2, 0.3 is recommended)
temperatureHint2: Lower values are steadier; higher values are more exploratory
title: Course Settings
ttsDescription: When enabled, the learner page offers a PPT + voice playback listen mode
ttsProviderHint: Choose the provider used to generate lesson narration
ttsProviderRequiredDesc: Please choose a voice provider before enabling listen mode.
unarchiveConfirm: Unarchiving moves the course back to "All". Editing and learning remain available.
uploadFailed: Upload failed, please try again later
useLearnerLanguageDescription: When enabled, the AI outputs content in the language the learner selects on the learner page
